sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_subsequence (id UInt32, text String);
INSERT INTO test_subsequence VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse - высокопроизводительная колонкоориентированная СУБД');
UPDATE test_subsequence SET text = 'ClickHouse - быстрая и эффективная СУБД' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT hasSubsequenceUTF8(text, 'СУБД') FROM test_subsequence WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, hasSubsequenceUTF8(text, 'ClickHouse') AS is_subsequence FROM test_subsequence;
